merged_main_history_highlights.title: results: add capped Cohere PAL vs external L1 pilot (#357)
merged_main_history_highlights.summary: Committed capped paired PAL vs external_l1_max pilot bundle under outputs/, plus allowlist/materialization helpers (scripts/build_fresh_gsm8k_paired_allowlist.py, scripts/materialize_cohere_paired_pal_external_bundle.py).

curated_committed_artifacts.diverse_root_pr_358: No standalone top-level docs/ report located for PR #358 in this snapshot; primary narrative is squash commit message plus experiments/scripts/tests implementing diverse-root frontier V1.

best_current_empirical_signal.label: capped paired PAL vs external_l1_max pilot (PR #357 bundle)

claim_boundary: Small capped paired pilot on a fresh allowlist slice under explicit logical-call budgeting—not paper-level proof or broad external_l1_max defeat.
previous_targeted_pal_evidence: PAL fixed 21/28 targeted internal-loss cases after the PAL integration fix (internal loss-casebook milestone; not re-derived here).
main_remaining_bottlenecks: Need larger fresh paired PAL vs external_l1_max validation.
Remaining PAL failures mostly code absent / safety rejection.
Need clean metric consistency for PAL-aware discovery / Discovery3.
Need decide whether to improve PAL prompt or scale paired validation first.
recommended_next_research_action: No new algorithmic variant before scaling evidence; run a larger paired PAL-vs-external validation only after a no-API preflight that estimates calls and case count under the chosen caps.
